title: Sports Balls With Hand Pump For Kids - (pack Of 4) 6-inch Diameter Rubber Sport Ball Toy Set Includes Mini Kids Football, Soccer Ball, Basketball And Playground For Fun Outdoors And Indoors
features: SPORTS BALL VARIETY PACK: Each 4-Pack of Bedwina Sports Balls includes a Basketball, Soccer Ball, Football, Playground Ball, and Hand Pump with Needle. Balls each measure 6 inches in diameter and the Football measures 6 inches in length when inflated. Sports balls are smaller than regulation size versions but just right for younger kids to grip and throw

INTRODUCE YOUR LITTLE ONES TO SPORTS: Introducing your little ones to sports early on is often a great way to support their motor skill development, social awareness, and verbal/non-verbal communication skills. The Bedwina Sports Ball Pack gives your younger kids an ample opportunity to have fun while they develop their physical abilities

INCLUDES PUMP & EASY TO INFLATE: This sports toy set comes complete with everything you need to keep your kids active. Use the included hand pump and 2-needles to easily inflate each of the sports balls quickly so they are ready to use. They are an excellent way for kids and families to get some fresh air while playing outside

HIGH-QUALITY DURABLE BALLS: These balls for kids are made from a high-quality soft rubber material, that will not deflate easily when playing. They are non-toxic, safe for kids, all balls measure 6 inches in diameter & football; 6 inches in length, and designed for indoor and outside play. Note: Balls arrive deflated
